details.test: Task 1: One-time $45 donation to top childrenFedPer10 program
Task 2: $25 monthly donation to highest malnutrition country
Task 3: Register for earliest high-need Saturday volunteer event next month
Task 4: Start $39/month sponsorship for longest-waiting child 6-10 in Central America
Task 5: Register adult and child for earliest Family 5K in Chicago in June
Task 6: Create personal Summer Meals 2025 fundraiser and copy link
Task 7: Request info kit for African program serving 50,000+ children
Task 8: Send advocacy letter on school breakfast funding for ZIP 10001
